title: LEX - ASSET Message Schema
description: Schema for ASSET message type - universal inventory and specifications for all 18 asset classes (ground vehicles, motorcycles, aviation, rail, maritime, heavy equipment, technology, energy, healthcare, space, defense, and more).

asset.description: Universal asset base - fields shared across all asset classes. Populate one implementation block (groundVehicle, aircraft, etc.) matching the assetClass.

assetId.description: Universal asset identifier: VIN (automotive), MSN (aircraft), IMO number (maritime), IMEI (mobile), serial number, or SKU.

manufacturer.description: OEM / brand name (Toyota, Airbus, Siemens, Apple, GE Healthcare, etc.)

assetSerialNumber.description: Universal serial or registration number. Format standard specified in serialNumberFormat.

operatingHours.description: Cumulative operating hours (flight hours, engine hours, machine hours, etc.)

groundVehicle.description: Automotive / ground vehicle specific attributes. Use when assetClass = VEHICLE, COMMERCIAL, RECREATIONAL, or MICROMOBILITY.

vin.description: Vehicle Identification Number - automotive assets only

bodyType.description: Body / configuration type for ground vehicles

odometerStatus.description: Odometer reading integrity — required for compliant title transfer (49 CFR Part 580). A bare mileage number is legally insufficient without this qualifier.

installedOptions.description: Options and accessories installed on this specific unit. Source classification determines MSRP inclusion and warranty scope.

source.description: OEM_FACTORY = included in MSRP; DEALER_INSTALLED = dealer add-on post-build; AFTERMARKET = non-OEM

motorcycle.description: Two-wheeler / motorcycle specifications. Use when assetClass = MOTORCYCLE or MICROMOBILITY. Spec: LEX_TWO_WHEELER_EXAMPLES.md

aircraft.description: Aviation asset specifications. Use when assetClass = AVIATION. Spec: LEX_MULTI_INDUSTRY.md

manufacturerSerialNumber.description: MSN — permanent unique airframe identifier that never changes regardless of registry, operator, or refurbishment

totalLandings.description: Total pressurisation cycles / landings — cycle-limited structural items dominate valuation for short-haul narrowbodies (737, A320)

engines.description: Per-engine record — engines are valued independently from the airframe; green-time vs. PBH-enrolled engines carry different market premiums

programEnrollment.description: Power-by-the-hour or engine health program — enrolled engines carry coverage premium over green-time engines

openAirworthinessDirectives.description: AD compliance status — open ADs are a direct discount or deal-stopper; recurring ADs represent future cost obligations buyers must price in

lastHeavyMaintenanceCheck.description: Most recent heavy check (C/D-check) — costs $1–8M and due on fixed intervals; imminent check creates major buyer capital exposure

supplementalTypeCertificates.description: STCs installed on this airframe — FAA/EASA-approved modifications affecting ADS-B compliance, resale value, and modification compatibility

storageStatus.description: Long-term stored aircraft require Return-to-Service inspections and de-preservation before delivery — directly affects timeline and cost

cabinRefurbishmentStatus.description: Cabin condition relative to market expectations — a needed refurb is a separate cost bucket in offer construction

cabinRefurbishmentEstimatedCostUsd.description: Estimated cabin refurbishment cost in USD

railAsset.description: Rail asset specifications. Use when assetClass = RAIL. Spec: LEX_MULTI_INDUSTRY.md

watercraft.description: Maritime / vessel specifications. Use when assetClass = MARITIME. Spec: LEX_MULTI_INDUSTRY.md

classNotation.description: Full classification society notation string (e.g. '+100A1', '+1A1 Tanker for Oil ESP', 'BV I Hull AUT-UMS') — encodes approved trade routes, structural standards, and automation level

ciiRating.description: IMO Carbon Intensity Indicator — mandatory since IMO 2023; D/E rating for 3 consecutive years triggers trading restrictions and ESG financing issues

drydockSchedule.description: Drydock schedule — costs $0.5M–5M+ with 10–40 days off-hire; imminent drydock is a major capital exposure for buyers

specialSurveyDueDate.description: 5-year class renewal survey due date — more extensive than intermediate; major negotiating point in S&P transactions

pniClub.description: P&I Club cover — required by most time-charter parties; outstanding claims affect coverage transferability

inventoryOfHazardousMaterials.description: IHM compliance — required for EU Ship Recycling Regulation; non-compliance blocks sale into certain jurisdictions

speedConsumptionWarranty.description: Warranted speed and fuel consumption — present in main terms of every charter party; basis for off-hire claims

portStateControlRecord.description: PSC inspection record — multiple detentions signal maintenance culture issues and appear on Tokyo/Paris MOU targeting lists

lastCargoDetails.description: Last cargo carried — tanker operators require last three cargoes for compatibility assessment; missing this defers to costly on-site inspection

heavyEquipment.description: Construction, mining, and agricultural equipment. Use when assetClass = HEAVY_EQUIPMENT. Spec: LEX_MULTI_INDUSTRY.md

pin.description: Product Identification Number per ISO 10261 — 17-char universal identifier used across OEM DMS, telematics platforms, and auction systems

idleHoursRatio.description: Percentage of total SMU recorded as engine idle (telematics-derived) — high idle ratio reduces effective drivetrain wear vs. same-SMU working machine

undercarriageWear.description: Crawler undercarriage component wear — replacement costs $80,000–$250,000; broken out as a separate line item in every used equipment appraisal

majorComponentHistory.description: Rebuild/replacement history for major components — defines whether hours are on original or rebuilt components; standard in Ritchie Bros./IronPlanet listings

telematicsPlatform.description: Enrolled telematics platform — NONE means all hour/idle data is self-reported and unverifiable; AEMP_COMPLIANT allows cross-OEM data access

dutyCycle.description: Primary operational duty — same SMU means very different wear rates; appraisers and OEM residual programs apply duty-cycle adjustment factors

rentalFleetHistory.description: Rental fleet background — rental machines accumulate SMU faster and under less controlled conditions; specific discount trigger in dealer and auction valuations

detailedWarrantyStatus.description: Active OEM or extended warranty — active warranty commands a price premium and constrains service interval requirements to maintain coverage

expirySmu.description: Expiry in service meter units — whichever (date or SMU) comes first

technologyDevice.description: Technology / IT / Telecom asset specifications. Use when assetClass = TECHNOLOGY or TELECOM. Spec: LEX_MULTI_INDUSTRY.md

biosLockStatus.description: Device lock state — MDM_SUPERVISED or ACTIVATION_LOCK means device cannot be provisioned for a new organization without unlock; #1 cause of failed ITAD transactions

dataSanitizationRecord.description: Data destruction certification — hard blocker for regulated sector procurement (GDPR Art. 5, HIPAA, PCI DSS 9.8)

batteryHealthPct.description: Battery State of Health as % of original design capacity — enterprise deployments typically require ≥80% for DaaS SLA eligibility

imeiNumbers.description: Per-radio IMEI/MEID records with carrier lock and GSMA blacklist status — blacklisted devices cannot be activated on any major carrier

cosmeticGrade.description: Standardized cosmetic condition per ITAD industry standard — FMR=Factory Mint Refurbished; Grade A minimum typically required for DaaS SLA contracts

softwareLicensePortability.description: Pre-installed software license transferability — OEM OS licenses transfer with hardware; volume licenses require Software Assurance for transfer rights

osEolDate.description: End-of-Life date for currently installed OS — EOL before DaaS contract expiry triggers mandatory mid-term refresh event

assetTagId.description: Enterprise asset tag from current owner's CMDB/ITAM system — operational handoff identifier between seller ITAM and buyer's receiving process

medicalDevice.description: Medical device / healthcare equipment. Use when assetClass = HEALTHCARE. Spec: LEX_MULTI_INDUSTRY.md

energyAsset.description: Energy generation and storage asset. Use when assetClass = ENERGY. Spec: LEX_MULTI_INDUSTRY.md

spaceAsset.description: Space asset specifications. Use when assetClass = SPACE. Spec: LEX_MULTI_INDUSTRY.md

defenseAsset.description: Defense asset specifications. Use when assetClass = DEFENSE. Sensitive - populate per export control rules (ITAR/EAR/EU CFSP). Spec: LEX_MULTI_INDUSTRY.md

evSpecifications.description: Cross-cutting electric/hybrid drivetrain spec. Attach to any electric asset regardless of assetClass. Spec: LEX_EV_EXTENSIONS.md

drivetrainType.description: BEV=pure electric, PHEV=plug-in hybrid, HEV=self-charging hybrid, FCEV=hydrogen, MHEV=48V mild hybrid, EREV=range-extended EV

taxCreditEligibility.description: Informational only - asOf date required for accuracy

typeSpecificAttributes.description: Organisation-specific extension fields. Use OrganizationContext extension schemas.
